sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.30 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: Is it true that the rank of a torsion-free soluble group is equal to the rank of any of its subgroups of finite index? The answer is affirmative for groups having a rational series (D.\,I.\,Zaitsev, in: Groups with restrictions on subgroups, Naukova dumka, Kiev, 1971, 115--130 (Russian)). We note also that every torsion-free soluble group of finite rank contains a subgroup of finite index which ha...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
